instruction:
Perform the following operations on the given complex numbers.
(1) Express the complex number $z = -1 + 3 \mathrm{i}$ in exponential form;
(2) Calculate the complex number $\left( \frac{1-\sqrt{3} \, \mathrm{i}}{2} \right)^{3}$.

Options:
A. $$
\sqrt{3 0} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (- 7 )+\pi]}
$$
$$
4 + \mathrm{i}
$$
B. $$
\sqrt{1 0} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (-3 )+\pi]}
$$
$$
- 1
$$
C. $$
\sqrt{1 4} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (- 2 )+\pi/4]}
$$
$$
0
$$
D. $$
\sqrt{2} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (-8 )+\pi/2]}
$$
$$
- 5
$$
E. $$
\sqrt{1 2} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (-1 )+\pi/3]}
$$
$$
1 + \mathrm{i}
$$
F. $$
\sqrt{5} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (2 )+\pi /2]}
$$
$$
- 8
$$
G. $$
\sqrt{2 5} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (-5 )+\pi/3]}
$$
$$
1
$$
H. $$
\sqrt{9} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (-4 )-\pi]}
$$
$$
- 1 + \mathrm{i}
$$
I. $$
\sqrt{7} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (-6 )]}
$$
$$
- 1 -\mathrm{i}
$$
J. $$
\sqrt{6} \, \mathrm{e}^{i [ \operatorname{a r c t a n} (3 )+2\pi]}
$$
$$
2 - \mathrm{i}
$$
